title: Seán McLoughlin (communist)
extract: Seán McLoughlin (2 June 1895 – 13 February 1960) was an Irish nationalist and communist activist.  When only twenty, he was made a commandant-general during the Easter Rising.  He was then prominent in Irish and British socialist parties before fighting with the Irish Republican Army during the Irish Civil War. He was also a leader in Na Fianna Éireann.
